title: Creston's UK City Pack
description: UK City Decorative Traffic Lights, Roads & more
body: ![Traffic Lights](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NdxNtG4E/images/ed8a2ff2541a3977e19cbe1457c42cdf9d2b3484.png) # Welcome to Creston's UK City Pack This was developed for a Modded Minecraft City built in Creative. We are still now in Beta development and everything is subject to change as we are still learning how to develop mods. Items & Blocks are now survival friendly from v0.1.0 "Signs of Survival Update" ## Current Block Types - Roads - Double Yellow Lines - Double Red Lines - Central & Junction Road Markings - Kurbs - Traffic Lights - Wheelie Bins - Storm Drains - Kitchen Modern Counters - Bollards / Barriers - Litter Bin - Roadsigns ## Current Items - Train Tickets - Parking Tickets # Future Updates ## Block Types - More House Furniture - More Street Furniture - Benches - Traffic Cones - Barriers - More Roadsigns ## Items
